description_long: This is a vintage-style, upright vending machine with a rectangular, boxy form and a bright red exterior. The front panel features a metallic display area with a glass-covered window, a coin slot, a payment interface, and a product retrieval slot, all arranged vertically. Above the display, there is Cyrillic signage in white, indicating its Russian origin and suggesting it dispenses carbonated water. The sides and back are plain red metal, with the back showing a power cord and a vented panel for cooling. The machine stands on four small feet and is placed on a gray tiled surface. Its robust construction and utilitarian design are typical of public urban amenities.
description: A bright red, vintage-style vending machine with a metallic front panel, Cyrillic signage, and a product retrieval slot, designed for dispensing carbonated water.
description_view_0: Side view showing a plain red metal surface with a vented panel near the bottom and a power cord visible at the base.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the metallic control panel, coin slot, product retrieval slot, and prominent white Cyrillic signage at the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, entirely plain red metal with no visible features except the machine's outline.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a solid red metal back, a small access panel, and a power cord emerging from the lower left.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular metallic display panel is located on the upper front, featuring a glass-covered window, a meter, and printed instructions.
attribute_payment_interface: A coin slot and a possible bill acceptor are present on the right side of the front panel, both metallic and rectangular.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A single prominent button is visible below the display panel, metallic and circular, with no additional labeling.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A rectangular product retrieval slot with a transparent flap is located centrally on the lower front panel.
attribute_branding_or_signage: White Cyrillic text reading 'Газированная ВОДА' is prominently displayed at the top of the front panel, indicating the machine dispenses carbonated water.
